zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Foster於大約1602年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾圖維爾時，她的父親Thomas Foster25歲，母親Elizabeth Seamer20歲。她於1638年與William Fry在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼維姆斯結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1653年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼維姆斯享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Foster于大约1602年出生在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾圖維爾时，她的父亲Thomas Foster25岁，母亲Elizabeth Seamer20岁。她于1638年与William Fry在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼維姆斯结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1653年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼維姆斯享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Foster
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Forster   ‘worker in a forest’.
English: perhaps a nickname from Middle English foster ‘foster parent’ (Old English fōstre, a derivative of fōstrian ‘to nourish or rear’). But other explanations are equally or more likely.
English: from Old French forcetier ‘maker of scissors’; see Forster 2.

variants.name: Fewster
meanings: English (mainly East Yorkshire and Durham): occupational name from Anglo-Norman French and Middle English fu(y)ster ‘maker of saddletrees’. See also Foster .

variants.name: Forster
meanings: English: shortened form of   Forrester  , an occupational name for someone who worked in a forest.
English: possibly a Norman French nickname or occupational name from Old French forcetier ‘maker of scissors or shears, cutler’. Compare Force and Forse .

German (mainly Förster): agent derivative of Middle High German forst ‘forest’, denoting someone who lived in or near a royal forest, or who worked in one (see Forst ). This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine). Compare Foerster .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Foster was born about 1602, in Turville, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Foster, was 25 and her mother, Elizabeth Seamer, was 20. She married William Fry in 1638, in Weymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died about 1653, in Weymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Foster est née environ 1602, à Turville, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Foster, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Seamer, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé William Fry en 1638, à Weymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1653, à Weymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Foster um 1602 in Turville, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Foster 25 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Seamer 20. Sie hat 1638 in Weymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America William Fry geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1653 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Weymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Foster è nata il circa 1602 nel Turville, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas Foster, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Seamer, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato William Fry nel 1638, nel Weymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì circa 1653, nel Weymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Fosterが約1602年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアトゥルヴィルで生まれた時，父Thomas Fosterは25歳，母Elizabeth Seamerは20歳であった。1638年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーウエイモウスでWilliam Fryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1653年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーウエイモウスで53歳で死去した。

ko.Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay C: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 도르체스터
ko.Weymouth, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Col: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 w이모우스

ko.Weymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Brit: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 w이모우스

ko.Weymouth, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Col: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 w이모우스
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Foster(이)가 대략 1602년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 터르빌에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Foster(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Seamer(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1638년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 w이모우스에서 William Fry(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1653년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 w이모우스에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Foster nasceu aproximadamente 1602, em Turville, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Foster, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Seamer, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com William Fry em 1638, em Weymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1653, em Weymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Foster родилась около 1602 г. в местности турвилл, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Foster было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Seamer, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Fry в 1638 г. в местности вимоут, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла около 1653 г. в местности вимоут, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Foster nació aproximadamente 1602, en Turville, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Foster, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Seamer, tenía 20 años. Se casó con William Fry en 1638, en Weymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1653, en Weymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 53 años.
